sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the kidneys acquired before and after intravenous iodinated contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Right kidney: pole-to-pole size, cortical thickness, any lesion. Left kidney: same.
Cystic lesion(s) — for EACH: size (mm), pre/post-contrast attenuation (enhancement = >=20 HU increase), wall thickness, number/thickness of septa, calcification, and any nodule, then assign Bosniak v2019 class:
- I = thin (<=2 mm) smooth wall, no septa/calcification/enhancement (~0% malignant).
- II = a few (1-3) thin (<=2 mm) septa or thin calcification; small hyperdense non-enhancing cyst (~0%).
- IIF = smooth minimally thickened (3 mm) enhancing wall/septa, or >=4 thin (<=2 mm) enhancing smooth septa (~5%).
- III = thick (>=4 mm) or irregular enhancing wall/septa (~50%).
- IV = enhancing nodule (>=4 mm convex obtuse-margin protrusion, or any-size acute-margin protrusion) (~90%).
Solid mass(es): size (mm), enhancement (HU), macroscopic fat (suggests AML), necrosis, and staging features (renal vein/IVC tumour thrombus, perinephric/sinus fat, nodes).
Collecting systems / hydronephrosis.
Calculi: size (mm), location, attenuation (HU); obstruction.
Ureters and bladder.
Perinephric fat, adrenals, and vasculature.

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise prioritised bullets. For each cystic lesion give the Bosniak v2019 class, laterality, and size (mm). Management implication: Bosniak I-II = benign, no follow-up; IIF = imaging surveillance (e.g. 6 and 12 months then annually to 5 years); III-IV = urology referral for surgery/ablation vs active surveillance. For a solid enhancing mass, state size and enhancement (HU) and recommend urology referral; note any renal vein/IVC tumour thrombus. Report obstructing or significant calculi (size, location, HU). Use only approved follow-up phrasing.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
